---
title: "Caged Lion, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”."
---

## Caged Lion, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1870
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

### Notes

This seems to be the first publication with “Charlotte M. Yonge” given as author.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
